Cinder Basalt Flats

Category: biomes Domain: environment Subtype: biome

A scorched basalt plateau with fissure vents and sparse heat-tolerant flora stretching between cooled lava rivers.

Cinder Basalt Flats stretch between cooled lava rivers and active vent clusters across the eastern volcanic belt.

Wind carries fine ash that settles in ripple patterns across dark stone fields. Explorers note reduced visibility during thermal updrafts.

Related

  • ember salamander
  • ashwind harbor
